fix_patch:
diff --git a/AGENTS.md b/AGENTS.md
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..9b1249368
--- /dev/null
+++ b/AGENTS.md
@@ -0,0 +1,33 @@
+# Hugo Repository - Agent Notes
+
+## Repository Structure
+- `metrics/` - Template metrics tracking (used by `--templateMetrics` and `--templateMetricsHints` CLI flags)
+- `tpl/partials/` - Partial template rendering; calls `TrackValue` for metrics hints
+- `tpl/tplimpl/` - Template execution; calls `MeasureSince` for timing metrics
+- `deps/deps.go` - Creates metrics provider based on `templateMetrics`/`templateMetricsHints` config flags
+
+## Key Bug Fixed: templateMetricsHints (metrics/metrics.go)
+
+### Bug
+`diff.add()` in `metrics/metrics.go` only initialized `d.baseline` when a "not truthful"
+(empty/nil/zero) value was passed. For truthful (non-empty) values, `d.baseline` remained
+`nil`, causing `howSimilar(v, nil)` to always return 0. This made `cacheFactor` always 0
+for templates producing non-empty output.
+
+### Fix
+Added `d.count == 0` check to initialize baseline for the first truthful value:
+
+```go
+if d.count == 0 {
+    d.baseline = v
+    d.count = 1
+    d.simSum = 100
+    return d
+}
+```
+
+## Testing Notes
+- `go test ./metrics/...` - Tests for the metrics package
+- Some tests in `hugolib` fail with "permission denied" for `/tmp/hugo_cache` - pre-existing environment issue
+- `TestJSEscaping` in `tpl/internal/go_templates/texttemplate` fails - pre-existing issue
+- `go vet` panics when analyzing `resources/page` package - pre-existing issue
diff --git a/metrics/metrics.go b/metrics/metrics.go
index 329981202..73d4b3f13 100644
--- a/metrics/metrics.go
+++ b/metrics/metrics.go
@@ -59,6 +59,13 @@ func (d *diff) add(v interface{}) *diff {
 		return d
 	}
 
+	if d.count == 0 {
+		d.baseline = v
+		d.count = 1
+		d.simSum = 100
+		return d
+	}
+
 	d.simSum += howSimilar(v, d.baseline)
 	d.count++
